Job Description: Human Resources (HR) Executive
Role Overview
The HR Executive is responsible for managing end-to-end human resource functions including recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and organizational development. This role ensures a positive work environment while aligning HR practices with business goals.
Key Responsibilities
	•	Handle end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes
	•	Maintain and update employee records, HR databases, and documentation
	•	Support performance appraisal and employee development initiatives
	•	Manage attendance, leave, and payroll coordination
	•	Address employee queries, grievances, and promote a healthy work culture
	•	Ensure compliance with company policies and labor laws
	•	Assist in HR audits, reports, and MIS
	•	Organize employee engagement activities and training programs
Required Skills & Qualifications
	•	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	•	1–3 years of experience in an HR role (freshers can be considered for junior roles)
	•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	•	Knowledge of HR processes, policies, and basic labor laws
	•	Proficiency in MS Office / HRMS tools
	•	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism
Preferred Attributes
	•	Problem-solving mindset
	•	Strong organizational and time management skills
	•	Positive attitude with a people-first approach
Department
Human Resources (HR)
Reporting To
HR Manager / HR Lead

intelligence.raw_jd:
Job Title: Data Analyst
Location: Hybrid / Onsite
Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary
We are looking for a detail-oriented Data Analyst who can collect, analyze, and interpret large datasets to support business decision-making. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, experience with SQL and Python, and the ability to translate data insights into actionable recommendations.
Key Responsibilities
	•	Collect, clean, and analyze structured and unstructured data from multiple sources
	•	Write complex SQL queries to extract and manipulate data
	•	Perform data analysis using Python (Pandas, NumPy)
	•	Create interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI / Tableau
	•	Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies to support business strategies
	•	Work closely with stakeholders to understand business requirements
	•	Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity
	•	Present insights and findings to non-technical teams
Required Skills & Qualifications
	•	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field
	•	2–4 years of experience as a Data Analyst
	•	Strong proficiency in SQL
	•	Hands-on experience with Python for data analysis
	•	Experience with Power BI or Tableau
	•	Solid understanding of data cleaning, data modeling, and data visualization
	•	Strong problem-solving and communication skills
Preferred Skills
	•	Experience with Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, formulas)
	•	Basic knowledge of statistics
	•	Experience working with large datasets

Job Description – Software Engineer (Backend)

Job Title: Software Engineer (Backend)
Location: Remote / Hybrid / On-site
Experience: 2–5 Years
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary:
We are seeking a skilled Backend Software Engineer to design, develop, and maintain scalable server-side applications. The candidate should have strong problem-solving skills and experience building reliable backend systems.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design and develop backend services and RESTful APIs
• Build scalable and secure server-side applications
• Work with SQL and NoSQL databases
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize performance and ensure system reliability
• Collaborate with frontend, DevOps, and product teams
• Debug and resolve production issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Proficiency in Python / Java / Node.js
• Experience with backend frameworks (FastAPI, Spring Boot, Express, etc.)
• Strong understanding of REST APIs and microservices
• Hands-on experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB)
• Familiarity with Git and version control
• Knowledge of authentication and security best practices

Preferred Qualifications:
• Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
• Knowledge of Docker and containerization
• Exposure to CI/CD pipelines
• Experience working in Agile environments

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary
• Flexible work environment
• Career growth opportunities
• Collaborative team culture

🏢 Department:
Cloud & Infrastructure Engineering
🧾 Role Summary:
We are seeking a skilled DevOps Engineer to build, automate, and maintain scalable CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure. The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between development and operations, ensuring faster, reliable, and secure software delivery.

🎯 Key Responsibilities:
	•	Design and manage CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment
	•	Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools like Terraform or ARM
	•	Manage cloud environments (Azure / AWS / GCP)
	•	Containerize applications using Docker and manage orchestration with Kubernetes
	•	Monitor system performance and ensure high availability
	•	Automate configuration management using Ansible or similar tools
	•	Implement security best practices and compliance controls
	•	Troubleshoot production and deployment issues
	•	Collaborate with development teams to improve release cycles

🛠️ Required Skills:
	•	Strong experience with CI/CD tools (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
	•	Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes
	•	Knowledge of Linux system administration
	•	Experience with cloud platforms (Azure preferred)
	•	Familiarity with scripting (Bash, Python, PowerShell)
	•	Experience with version control systems (Git)
	•	Understanding of networking, DNS, load balancing, and firewalls

🎓 Qualifications:
	•	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
	•	3–6 years of experience in DevOps / Cloud Engineering

🌟 Preferred Qualifications:
	•	Experience with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Azure Monitor)
	•	Knowledge of microservices architecture
	•	Exposure to security and DevSecOps practices
	•	Certification in Azure / AWS / Kubernetes (preferred but not mandatory)

🚀 What We Offer:
	•	Competitive salary and performance bonuses
	•	Health & insurance benefits
	•	Flexible working environment
	•	Opportunity to work on cloud-native and AI-driven systems
	•	Continuous learning and certification support

Job DescriptionRole: MLOps Engineer – GenAI & Cloud Automation
Experience: 2–4 Years
Location: Bangalore, Hybrid
Employment Type: Full-Time
About the Role
We are looking for a highly skilled MLOps Engineer with GenAI and Cloud Automation expertise to design, deploy, and scale machine learning and AI-driven systems in production environments. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in Databricks, MLflow, CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Terraform, Kubernetes, and RAG-based GenAI systems.
In addition to core MLOps responsibilities, this role requires exposure to API development, system integration, testing frameworks, and basic frontend collaboration to support AI-powered applications end-to-end.
Key ResponsibilitiesMLOps & ML Platform Engineering
	•	Design, deploy, and maintain scalable ML pipelines using Databricks, PySpark, and MLflow.
	•	Implement end-to-end model lifecycle management, including experiment tracking, model registry, validation, and monitoring.
	•	Productionize ML and GenAI workloads with proper governance, observability, and automated testing.
	•	Develop RESTful APIs (FastAPI/Flask) to expose ML/LLM services for application integration.
GenAI & LLMOps
	•	Develop and deploy RAG-based solutions using Azure AI Search and LLMs.
	•	Build AI-powered agents for enterprise use cases (e.g., automation, provisioning, business intelligence).
	•	Optimize retrieval pipelines and ensure scalable LLM deployments.
	•	Collaborate with frontend teams to integrate AI services into web-based dashboards or enterprise portals.
Performance, Testing & Optimization
	•	Improve system efficiency by optimizing runtimes and cost.
	•	Implement data drift monitoring using statistical techniques (SciPy/Evidently AI).
	•	Ensure reliability through logging, monitoring, alerting, and automated test coverage (unit/integration tests).
	•	Participate in performance testing, load testing, and API validation processes.
Required Skills & QualificationsTechnical Skills
	•	Strong experience in Databricks, PySpark, MLflow
	•	Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Azure Pipelines / Jenkins)
	•	Experience with Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes
	•	Cloud experience in Azure and/or AWS
	•	Experience with GenAI, RAG architectures, Azure AI Search
	•	Strong Python programming and scripting skills
	•	Experience in distributed computing (Ray, Spark)
	•	Understanding of API development (FastAPI/Flask)
	•	Basic familiarity with frontend technologies (React/JavaScript) for integration purposes
	•	Knowledge of testing frameworks (PyTest or similar)
	•	Good understanding of data drift monitoring and ML observability
Good to Have
	•	Experience building AI Agents for automation use cases
	•	Experience with Prompt orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, PromptFlow)
	•	Experience managing Databricks Asset Bundles (DABs)

Key Responsibilities
	•	Handle end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes
	•	Maintain and update employee records, HR databases, and documentation
	•	Support performance appraisal and employee development initiatives
	•	Manage attendance, leave, and payroll coordination
	•	Address employee queries, grievances, and promote a healthy work culture
	•	Ensure compliance with company policies and labor laws
	•	Assist in HR audits, reports, and MIS
	•	Organize employee engagement activities and training programs

	•	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field

	•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	•	Knowledge of HR processes, policies, and basic labor laws
	•	Proficiency in MS Office / HRMS tools
	•	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism
Preferred Attributes
	•	Problem-solving mindset
	•	Strong organizational and time management skills
